fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: InvestorPlace has flagged UVXY as one of ten leveraged ETFs that are structurally designed to lose value over time. This cautionary note highlights the inherent risks associated with inverse and leveraged volatility products, suggesting that even short-term gains can be eroded by the products' decay mechanisms. Traders considering UVXY should be aware of its long-term depreciation potential.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose

examples.body: A good news for contrarian bear traders, your $SOXS $SQQQ $UVIX $UVXY are getting cheaper again if you were interested in adding to your (strong market crash) …
